llm_instruction: Use this small file for country-and-function-specific matching. Copy job URLs exactly. Never construct basf.jobs links.

jobs.title: Sales Manager, Rigids PU - Performance Materials
jobs.description: Objectives of the Position Sales: To plan and direct sales and marketing activities in a specific Zone (major geographic area)/ construction segment in order to achieve agreed sales volume, pricing, margins and selling cost objectives by implementing consistently the overall sales strategy, using technical, organizational and customer knowledge. To ensure timely payment of receivables from customers In addition, provide inputs and participate in the marketing, market planning and technical development of products and services. Specifications and BD: Establishing rapport with Specifiers - architects, consultants and designers in public and private organizations in particular with RDSO, EIL, HPCL, ONGC and know about all their upcoming projects. Focusing on Specifiers in chosen segments for specification selling in line with our Segment Strategy, to get our systems specified at the design stage of projects. Generation of sales potential (Volume) meeting quarterly and yearly targets through specification of our systems and through breaking competitors’ specifications in our favour. Assisting in organising technical seminars, etc to key Specifiers organisations. Main Tasks Sales: Stimu

jobs.title: Executive - Customer Service, Demand Planner
jobs.description: About The Role To service the customers of the assigned Business Unit and order management Driving Demand Planning and Service Excellence Proactive Customer Orientation Communication Effectiveness Continuous Improvement How Will You Do It Strategic- Key Activities: Perform sales and delivery order management according to SOP Monitor orders and communicate to customers Sales team on order status Perform business rules and manage data related to order-to-cash process. Responsible to conduct Monthly S OP meetings provide key inputs to management for operations during meeting. Conduct regular analysis of supply chain performance metrics and identify areas for improvement. Coordinate with cross-functional teams i.e. operations, product management controlling to optimize supply chain processes and resolve any issues or bottlenecks. Stay updated on industry trends, emerging technologies, and regulatory changes impacting the customer service operations or supply chain operations taking necessary actions wherever required. jobs.title: Sales Manager - Animal Nutrition, Vitamins and Carotenoids
jobs.description: About The Role To drive profitable growth of business in India. How You Will Do It Plan and direct sales activities in India to achieve agreed sales volume, pricing and selling cost objectives by implementing consistently the overall sales strategy, using technical, organizational and customer knowledge. Be responsible for business top line, bottom line and volume growth as per annual targets. Develop and maintain strategic long-term business relationships with respective accounts (all decision-makers) to promote brand value. Handle and improve sales of Vitamins and Carotenoids products in Animal Nutrition Market in India. Support Business Head, South Asia with inputs to efficiently steer business operations. Provide inputs and participate in the marketing, market planning and technical development of products and services. Update customer data, account plans and market concept of assigned customers and market. Provide accurate sales forecasts, supporting efficient planning of products and services. Work with the R D, customer service and logistics personnel to establish a communication path with the customer to ensure sales opportunities for product and services. Develop market in

jobs.title: Regional Product Manager
jobs.description: M ain Areas of Responsibilities and Key Activities Product Portfolio Management : Develop and implement technology toolbox to optimize products, drive consolidation, and facilitate knowledge sharing among countries. Steward project proposals and manage PhaseGate projects. Strategic Marketing Projects : Lead marketing initiative for the Indian automotive market focused on profitable and sustainable growth. Conduct market analysis, optimize technology portfolios, and develop tailored product offerings. Pricing Management : Define and implement regional pricing policies, propose pricing actions, and ensure adherence to KAM Business Rules for margin management. Strategy Development : Build regional strategies for different coatings layers, define milestones, and promote collaboration across countries. Business Development : Act as the key contact for 2W accounts, identify opportunities, and support business restructuring efforts. Sales and Key Account Management : Drive growth and optimize sales turnover in the 2W segment, identifying areas for improvement and monitoring product performance. Recommend enhancements to sales and distribution efficiency in line with regional strategies. C

jobs.title: Assistant Sales Manager, Pharma Solutions
jobs.description: About The Role Drive sales Growth: Plan sales strategy in order to achieve agreed sales target and grow sustainably in the defined territory. Find opportunities: Develop project pipeline with customers, business partners and through partnerships with technical team Close profitable deals Market Research to cover trends, regulation, competitor and growth opportunities How You Will Do It Strategic: Strategy Development, conceptualization and implementation: contribute to the development and drive the execution of the Pharma Solutions strategy. Specific responsibilities include annual and short-termed sales plans, business and market development, market research and planning, strategic direction for local promotion, and partnering with other related management teams, e.g. customer service, supply chain, product management, marketing. jobs.title: Deputy Manager - Sales, Acrylic Acid & Esters
jobs.description: O bjectives of the Position : Drive Sales Business development activities for CPH SBU in sub region, including working with channel partners as appropriate M ain Tasks: CPH sales Service existing B2B customers and identify new customers to diversify customer base to ensure sustainable and healthy business development for CPH in the subregion. Manage the complete sales cycle with the customer. Develop lasting customer relationships to identify business trends in and beyond the customer scope or respective portfolio. Monitor competition by gathering market information on pricing, products, new product development, business models. Provide accurate sales forecast, supporting efficient planning of products and services. Identify customer requirements and offer solutions accordingly. Negotiate and close deals or contracts with customers and provide operational guidance and support to the relevant functional departments to ensure implementation. Implement customer and segment-specific strategies in alignment with Marketing.
